_comment: User-friendly config with JSON key comments. Keep unknown _comment_* keys as documentation.
_comment_multiwfn_path: Path to Multiwfn executable. Default: env QMSEP_MULTIWFN_PATH or built-in value.
_comment_orca_bin_path: Path to ORCA binary executable. Default: env QMSEP_ORCA_BIN_PATH or 'orca' from PATH.
_comment_max_retries: Maximum retries for failed ORCA jobs. Default: 1.
_comment_retry_delay: Delay between retries in seconds. Default: 5.
_comment_surface_mode: Surface mode. Options: vdw | ses | eps. Default: ses.
_comment_sample_points: Number of output sampling points. Default: 10000.
_comment_grid_spacing: Grid spacing in angstrom used in field construction. Default: 0.1.
_comment_log_level: Logging level. Options: DEBUG | INFO | WARNING | ERROR. Default: INFO.
_comment_keep_intermediates: Keep intermediate files instead of auto-cleanup. Default: false.
_comment_temp_dir: Temporary working directory root. Default: temp.
_comment_pdb2pqr_force_field: pdb2pqr force field. Options: AMBER | CHARMM | PARSE | TYL06 | PEOEPB | SWANSON. Default: SWANSON.
_comment_pqr_radius_scale: Radius scale factor for ORCA CPCM cavity. Default: 1.2.
_comment_orca_functional: ORCA DFT functional keyword. Default: B3LYP.
_comment_orca_nprocs: ORCA CPU cores in %pal nprocs. Default: 32.
_comment_orca_maxcore: ORCA max memory per core in MB. Default: 7000.
_comment_eps_gaussian_exponent: EPS gaussian exponent for rho_mol model (effective in eps mode). Default: 5.0.
_comment_eps_target_iso_level: EPS target isosurface value (effective in eps mode). Default: 0.999.
